Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.tactics

Class FunImgGoalApplier

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.tactics.FunImgGoalApplier
public class FunImgGoalApplier extends Object
This class is responsible for saturating the set of hypotheses with all hypotheses of the form "f(x) ∈ S2" that are computed from a given functional hypothesis of the form f ∈ S1 op S2 when the goal contains "f(x)" in a strictly well-defined position.

    • monitor

      private final Predicate goal

  • Constructor Details

    • FunImgGoalApplier

      public FunImgGoalApplier(IProofTreeNode node, IProofMonitor pm)

  • Method Details

    • saturate

      public void saturate()
      Saturates the set of visible hypotheses by applying repeatedly the funImgGoal tactic for each function application found in the goal. It uses the visible functional hypotheses.

    • apply

      private void apply(Predicate hyp, IPosition position)
      Tries to apply the funImgGoal tactic and updates the current node. If the tactic succeeds, the added hypothesis is stored to allow further attempts of funImgGoal on it at other shallower positions.
      Parameters:
      hyp - the functional hypothesis of the form f ∈ S1 op S2
      position - a valid position of an function application f(E) in the goal

    • isSameFunApp

      private boolean isSameFunApp(Predicate pred, IPosition position)
      Tells if the function of the functional application at the given position in the current goal is the same as the function in the left part of the given predicate of the form f ∈ S1 op S2
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate of the form f ∈ S1 op S2
      position - a position of functional application in the goal
      Returns:
      true iff the function of the functional application in the goal a the position is the function in the left part of the given predicate of the form f ∈ S1 op S2

    • getNewHyp

      private Predicate getNewHyp(IProofTreeNode oldNode)
      Returns the new hypothesis created by the precedent rule application.

    • isMemberOfFunRelForm

      private boolean isMemberOfFunRelForm(Predicate pred)
      Returns true iff the predicate is of the form f ∈ S1 op S2 where op is either relational or functional.
      Parameters:
      pred - the predicate to test
      Returns:
      true iff the predicate is of the form f ∈ S1 op S2

    • findFunAppPositions

      private List<IPosition> findFunAppPositions(Predicate pred)
      Finds function application positions (e.g. f(x)) in the given predicate and order them from the deepest to the shallowest.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      list of function application positions

    • searchFunctionalHyps

      private Set<Predicate> searchFunctionalHyps(IProverSequent seq)
      Find all visible hypotheses of the given sequent which are of the form f ∈ S1 op S2 where f denotes a function.
      Returns:
      a list of hypotheses the form f ∈ S1 op S2 where f is a function

    • getProofTreeNode

      public IProofTreeNode getProofTreeNode()
      Returns the open proof tree node.
